raw_response_text:
<features>
- fur color: gray, white
- fur length: long
- eye color: yellow
</features>
<kb>
- IF [fur color = brown AND/OR fur color = black AND/OR fur color = orange] THEN [20]
- IF [fur color = white AND fur color = black] THEN [29]
- IF [fur color = white AND fur color = brown] THEN [28]
- IF [fur color = white AND fur color = gray] THEN [13]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule that fires for the Query Image is: IF [fur color = white AND fur color = gray] THEN [13], because the Query Image has fur color gray and white.
</rule_check>
<response>13</response>
